nasb.text: As when a man flees from a lion And a bear meets him, Or goes home, leans his hand against the wall And a snake bites him.

esv.text: as if a man fled from a lion, and a bear met him, or went into the house and leaned his hand against the wall, and a serpent bit him.

cnv.text: 那日就像一個人避過了獅子， 卻遇上了熊； 回到家裡，手靠在牆上， 卻被蛇咬。

ccb.text: 你们的光景将好像人逃避狮子， 却遇上了熊， 逃回家里，手扶墙壁， 又被蛇咬。
